subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant whom Thou hast rendered bereft of the mantle of Thy divinity and kept remote from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی ان هذا عبدک الذی جعلته عریا عن رداء الوهیتک و بعیدا عن
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @presence of; reunion with God, @love of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @pain of love; love as veil
